specFidelityNotes: Diff a621100d vs d9ab6d4d on feature/issue-490-business-advertiser-oauth. Implements issue #490 / ADR-034 Advertiser callback: public GET /v1/auth/tiktok/business/callback (no JWT), 400 on missing code/state, HMAC state→Juli user binding (401 on forged state), Marketing API token exchange via business-api.tiktok.com, encrypted persist with capability=business_advertiser separate from Shop Partner OAuth. Shop callback path and Partner secrets untouched (only app.py router include). Mirrors Shop OAuth prior art for layering and tests.

smells.name: Duplicated Code
smells.hunk: verify_state HMAC/base64 user_id extraction parallels TikTokOAuthInfrastructureService.verify_state in oauth.py
